title: DMC-12 Deal Handoff Capability v0.1.2
description: Input/output schema for ai.dmc12.automotive.deal_handoff (initiate_deal_handoff). Only DMC-12 capability that accepts customer PII. v0.1.1 added an optional `trade_in` object; v0.1.2 adds an optional channel-scoped `consent` object. Both are additive and non-breaking — the bare `customer_consent` boolean is unchanged.

reservation_token.description: Active reservation owned by the calling agent.

trade_in.description: Optional structured trade-in disclosure. Every field is optional; an empty object is a valid no-op. If any field is supplied, implementations MUST treat disclosure as implicit (trade_in_disclosed=true) regardless of the boolean. `appraised_value_partner` is a partner-supplied hint, NOT authoritative — the dealer re-appraises on intake. v0.1.1.

appraised_value_partner.description: Partner-supplied appraisal (KBB / MMR / Black Book / partner's own pricing stack). Hint only; not binding on the dealer.

notes.description: Agent-provided context, e.g. 'customer is a return buyer, purchased 2022 Outback from us'.

customer_consent.description: Customer explicitly authorized contact transfer. MUST be true — the schema rejects false so validators cannot accept a no-consent PII hand-off.

consent.description: OPTIONAL channel-scoped consent (v0.1.2). Records WHICH contact channels the customer authorized and WHEN that authorization lapses. The bare `customer_consent` boolean above remains the floor and is unchanged — sending only the boolean behaves exactly as pre-v0.1.2. `expires_at` IS enforced (a hand-off presented with an expired consent is rejected, error_code CONSENT_INVALID); `allowed_channels` are advisory (recorded + surfaced to dealer-ops, never used to gate contact). `consent_text` is unconstrained free text and is hashed before audit/persistence like `notes`. Design informed by AAP (autoagentprotocol.org); see SPEC.md §13.

allowed_channels.description: Non-empty, unique set of channels the customer authorized for contact. Advisory.

expires_at.description: When the consent lapses. MUST be a timezone-aware ISO-8601 timestamp; a hand-off after this instant is rejected (CONSENT_INVALID).

consent_text.description: Optional verbatim authorization language. Free text — hashed before audit/persistence (may carry PII).

sent_to_masked.description: Email address with local-part partially redacted (e.g. sa****@markmillersubaru.com).

trade_in.description: Single owner, clean Carfax, original tires.

output.next_steps: A sales manager will call the customer within 30 minutes.

consent.consent_text: I authorize Mark Miller Subaru to contact me about this vehicle.

output.next_steps: A sales manager will reach out on an authorized channel within 1 business day.
